question: Is the source-discipline uplift SCAFFOLD-INDEPENDENT — does the Sophia gate raise verify-or-abstain provenance faithfulness over the SAME raw base, consistently across >=3 distinct base families, on an EXTERNALLY-authored, sealed, unspent pack (author != runner, judge != subject)?
constructs: llm-judge-2family (two-box farm: Spark ollama:qwen2.5:7b-instruct + Mac openai:Llama-3.3-70B-4bit; judge != subject family)
independent-reviewer-signature (external human/reviewer signs a sampled verdict slice; reviewer != runner)
primaryMetric: scaffold-independent uplift = Sophia-gated minus raw on the SAME base (verify-or-abstain provenance faithfulness), per subject family; headline only when CI-clean and consistent across >=3 families
primaryN: 356 contested-attribution cases x 3 seeds per (subject family x condition)
primaryNDerivation: tools/eval_stats.required_n_for_mde(0.105) = 356 (p0=0.5, alpha=0.05, power=0.8, paired_rho=0.0, conservative unpaired worst case). mde_at_n(356) = 0.105 <= primaryMDE, so the pack is powered for the pre-registered practical effect. A verdict is REFUSED if mde_at_n(N) > effect (Pillar 2).

subjectFamilies.rule: >=3 DISTINCT base lineages (e.g. an OLMoE/Sophia-Wisdom adapter base, a Qwen base, a Llama base; exact set fixed at pre-registration) — generality needs lineage diversity, not one base
subjectFamilies.use: GO/NO-GO — a CI-clean win on ONE family is candidate_only; the headline requires consistency across >=3 families

judge.rule: >=2 independent judge families, mean Sophia-gated winrate > 0.5 across families, judge family != ANY subject family AND != gate

interJudgeAgreement.rule: Cohen's kappa >= 0.40 OR Gwet AC1 with a 95% CI excluding chance — PRE-COMMITTED before the run (if prevalence deflates kappa as in M3-SFT, report AC1 + the win-rate panel; no post-hoc metric switching)

seeds.rule: >=3 seeds per (subject family x condition); CIs reported, no bare means

reviewerSignature.rule: an INDEPENDENT reviewer (not the project's runner) signs a sampled slice of judge verdicts; signature + reviewer identity stored in the artifact

stoppingRule: fixed-n at the pre-registered N=356 (no peeking). If any metric is iterated/peeked across runs it MUST carry an anytime-valid confidence sequence (tools/eval_stats.confidence_sequence_mean) — a fixed-n CI is invalid under optional stopping.
decontam: tools/assert_decontam.py must pass at CONTENT level (exact/normalized-prompt PLUS content-shingle Jaccard near-duplicate scan) against ALL training corpora before the run; a single leak VOIDS the run. The pack is sealed: only its manifest hash (tools/seal_eval_pack.py) is committed until the run completes, then items are revealed. One pack = one spend; a re-judge on the same items is NOT a fresh independence result.
sealing: Pack authored by a party INDEPENDENT of this repo. Commit the signed manifest hash (sha256 over canonicalized items) via tools/seal_eval_pack.py BEFORE the run; --verify enforces the committed pack is unspent/untampered at run time.
ranking: guardrails first (>=3 families, judge!=subject, agreement floor, reviewer signature, decontam/sealed), then per-family uplift strength; a single-family win is a gate not a headline
honestLimits: removes the independence conflict on ONE construct (source-discipline) only — not a general AGI claim
a pass does NOT flip canClaimAGI: the full bar additionally needs long-horizon/learning-under-shift (roadmap P3) and a re-anchored instrument (roadmap P1)
deterministic markers partly reward trained FORMAT — the 2-family judge + reviewer signature are the semantic/independent cross-checks
kappa may be prevalence-deflated when judges agree the gate is better; AC1 + win-rate panel pre-committed for that case
a NO-GO is a valid, publishable outcome — log it in agi-proof/failure-ledger.md, do not re-spend the pack to fish for GO

enforcement.claim_gate: tools/claim_gate.py --prefix independence-eval --spec agi-proof/benchmark-results/independence/measurement_spec.json --assert-prereg — power, uncertainty, construct-FAMILY distinctness, decontam, magnitude; --assert-prereg checks this spec predates the result via git ancestry
enforcement.seal_pack: tools/seal_eval_pack.py — stable sha256 manifest (count + author + sealedAt) + --verify (sealed/unspent/untampered enforcement)
enforcement.runner: tools/run_independence_eval.py — per-family raw-vs-gated answers (pluggable backend), two-box judge farm, reviewer signature, eval_stats aggregation; --emit-pending writes a not-run NO-GO placeholder
enforcement.decontam: tools/assert_decontam.py — independent exact + content-shingle train/eval disjointness over the sealed pack
